items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where the persona views corporate vs local reporting split. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or outcomes from this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected result was achieved. The lack of concrete evidence means that we cannot definitively assess whether the requirement has been met.
